name: SARAWAK Plantation Bhd
summary: SARAWAK Plantation Bhd is a Malaysia-based company primarily involved in the cultivation of oil palm and processing of fresh fruit bunches (FFB) into crude palm oil (CPO) and palm kernel (PK). The company's operations include oil palm plantations and milling facilities, located mainly in Sarawak, Malaysia. SARAWAK Plantation aims to be a sustainable and efficient producer of palm oil products.
